title: EYECURL Heated Eyelash Curler, Heated Lash Curler, Eyelash Curler Heated for Perfect Curls Every Time - Long Lasting Makeup, Intelligent Power Off (Quartz Pink/Champagne Gold, X8-132MM)
features: *Natural-looking & Long-lasting: Follow the directions and you'll have long curled lashes all day long. Easily create an natural-looking, long-lasting curl eyelash in seconds with EYECURL heated eyelash curler.

*No pinching or Crimping Easy and Safe to Use: Softly lifts and curls lashes smoothly from base to tip, no pinching or crimping associated with traditional eyelash curlers. And you can get a beautiful natural curling eye lashes.The heated eyelashes curler comb fits naturally in your hand for comfort and easy of use.°).Simply choose a suitable temperature level for you eyelashes according to the user's manual.
*Compact and Portable :This electric eyelash curler with compact design, it fits neatly into your makeup case, gym bag or purse for quick touch-ups and for travel.

*4Levels Temperature Adjustable : A heat indicator on the top of the comb changes color from Pink to White to signal that the lash curler is fully heated and ready for you to use. Eyelash heated curler have 4 levels of intelligent temperature for all eyelash types,First Level (149℉/65°C) , Second Level (185℉/75°C) , Third Level(185℉/85 °C）and the Forth Level (203℉/95°).Simply choose a suitable temperature level for you eyelashes according to the user's manual.

*Rechargeable & Long Lithium Polymer Battery Life: This EYECURL heated eyelash curler operates with a 500mAh built-in rechargeable lithium polymer battery and lasts up to 30 days using. With Type-C fast charging input, heated eye lashes curler takes only 2 hours to be fully charged.
description: Product Description EYECURL Heated Eyelash Curler - For a Beautiful Natural Curling Eye Lashes Safe to Use The eyelash heated curler is designed with an insulated comb shape, the heat generating part is located at the bottom of the comb with anti-burn function, 0.2in/5mm precision tooth comb spacing can perfectly fit the distance for girl eye lashes. Comfort and Easy to Use The heated eyelashes curler fits naturally in your hand for comfort and easy to use. Portable,Take it to Anywhere You Need Type-C Fast Charging, supports various charging methods such as,On-board USB,Power Bank. Perfect to take it to anywhere you need and curl your eyelashes as you need. Natural-looking & 24H Long-lasting EYECURL heated eyelash curlers is for your perfect eyelash. EYECURL mini eyelash curler delivers the high level of performance, better curler and longer lasting effect. Warm Tips: 1. In order to better use this heated eye lash curler, please full charge it before the first time use (Please use the original one for charge). 2. Apply one coat of mascara on the eyelash before use 3. To get a better effect, slightly press and hold the heated eyelash curlers for 8-20 seconds while pointing in the direction that you want to create a curl. 4. If you are sensitive to temperature, it is recommended to start from the first gear. 5.The curling effect depends on the operation method and time. If you feel that the effect is not good, you can repeatedly curl your eyelashes several times until they curl up. 6. The brush head of the heated lash curler can be washed with water, but when cleaning, it should be noted that only the brush head can be washed, and the water cannot be splashed onto the product shell. Cleaning & Maintenance To ensure the better performance of the heating eyelash curler, please clean it before and after each use. Please make sure the device is turned off before start cleaning. Do not use steel wool, abrasive cleansers, chemicals, or corrosive liquids to clean it. Package Include: 1 x Heated Eyelash Curlers 1 x Type-C cable 1 x Clean brush 1 x User Manual
